title: SG Mob Trims
description: A mod that adds a chance to add armor trims to mobs with armor when spawned.
body: When a skeleton or a zombie spawns with some armor piece, it has a 50% chance to have an armor trim applied to its whole armor only in hard difficulty. The trim pattern and trim material is selected randomly so every material/pattern combination is equaly possible. The mobs can drop its armor when killed as a rare drop (that vanilla behavior was not modified), so now you can collect every type of armor with trims killing zombies and skeletons.![skeletons with armor trims](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c3db3b1ea50f233a1d67d6acda5836f81a949366_0.webp)![Zombies with armor trims](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ebaa5fe8b9a6a07e81dd3e43ddc3bee3620af884_0.webp)
